prompt_av:

She leans forward with her right arm resting on the white metal railing. The balcony is set into a building with weathered, peeling plaster walls in earthy tones of beige and tan, with a vertical pipe running along the left side of the frame and a circular plaque embedded in the wall to the lower right. Beside her, a small black-and-white dog sits, partially visible beneath the railing.

The woman maintains a quiet posture, her gaze directed outward from the balcony into the unseen space across from her. Her focus occasionally shifts, her head tilting slightly as she looks down at the resting dog. After a moment, she looks up again and her expression changes as she speaks.

She says, "It will be rainy. Have you brought umbrella with you children?"

The audio shows soft, echoing dog barks in the background, which blend into the quiet atmosphere. A woman’s voice then speaks clearly, breaking the stillness.

prompt_a: Soft, echoing dog barks in the background. A woman's voice speaks clearly: "It will be rainy. Have you brought umbrella with you children?"

prompt_av:
In a medium shot with cool, muted tones, two men lean against a rough, textured stone wall under diffused daylight. The man on the right, who is Black with short gray hair, wears a light blue shirt with the number tag “302” and dark blue jeans; he clasps his hands and gazes forward with a pensive look. Beside him, a white man with short brown hair wears a similar shirt with the number tag “574” and looks downward with a concerned expression. In the top right corner, white text reads “sugar_寒 bilibili.”

The Black man on the right lets out a quiet sigh, his shoulders settling slightly. He turns his head toward the other man and speaks in a gentle, reassuring tone. The white man remains looking down, his sorrowful expression deepening as he listens and then replies. In response, the Black man slowly shakes his head from side to side and releases another heavy sigh, his gaze returning forward as both men sit in a quiet pause.

He says, “But that doesn’t mean you’re a murderer.”
The other man replies, “Someone else must have killed my wife.”

The audio features quiet, close-miked dialogue spoken in gentle, somber tones. The sound of two distinct, heavy sighs is audible, one before the first line of dialogue and one after the second. There is no music or significant ambient background noise, placing focus entirely on the men's voices and breathing.
prompt_v: Medium shot, cool tones. Two men lean against a stone wall. A Black man (shirt '302') looks pensive. A white man (shirt '574') looks downward, concerned. Text: 'sugar_寒 bilibili' in the corner. The Black man's shoulders settle, he turns and says, 'But that doesn’t mean you’re a murderer.' The white man looks sorrowful and replies, 'Someone else must have killed my wife.' The Black man shakes his head and looks forward.
prompt_a: Close-miked dialogue in gentle, somber tones. A man says, 'But that doesn’t mean you’re a murderer.' Another replies, 'Someone else must have killed my wife.' Two heavy sighs are audible around the dialogue. No music or background noise.

The figure on the left, wearing a dark hooded top and light shorts, holds two glowing blue rectangular cards in each hand. The cards emit a bright blue light and particles, revealing purple symbols within the glow, including the characters “風” and “雷”. Opposite them, a figure in a brown outfit is captured mid-motion, with fiery orange and red streaks of energy radiating from their body.

The right-hand fighter strikes with a blazing fist as orange flames crackle and swirl around their hand, launching toward the opponent. The blue energy from the left figure’s cards surges forward to meet the attack. The two elemental forces collide in the space between them, erupting in a piercing explosion of light and stylized particles that briefly fills the center of the frame. As the light from the impact fades, the figure on the left takes a swift step back, their brow furrowed in concentration as they prepare for the next exchange. Seizing the opening, the warrior on the right charges forward across the grass, closing the distance with an unwavering, determined gaze fixed on their opponent.

The audio shows the sound of howling wind building in the background. A sharp, piercing sound accompanies the explosion. The background music starts with a tense atmosphere and intensifies, its tempo quickening to match the escalating pace of the battle.

prompt_av:
In a wide shot with a desaturated, cinematic quality, six soldiers in dark World War II-era British military uniforms and helmets walk away from the camera down the center of a narrow, paved street. The scene is captured with deep focus under diffuse, overcast daylight. Leaflets and small papers drift steadily from the sky, scattering across the road amidst other debris. The street is flanked by two-story brick and plaster houses with chimneys and utility lines, and a seventh soldier stands on the left sidewalk, facing slightly toward the group.

The soldiers, with rifles slung over their shoulders and some carrying backpacks, wander slowly forward through the eerily empty setting. Suddenly, their aimless pace changes. They slow their walk and their bodies tense, their posture shifting into a slight crouch. Gripping their rifles tightly, they bring the weapons from their shoulders into a ready position, aiming them forward down the street and heightening the tension of the moment.

The audio shows a quiet atmosphere dominated by the faint sound of wind and distant, intermittent bird calls. This stillness is abruptly broken by a series of explosions that echo from afar, their reverberations cutting through the silence.
